easy.title: Character Frequency Map
easy.description: Return dictionary mapping each char to its frequency.

medium.title: Invert Dictionary
medium.description: Invert dict keys and values (assume unique values). `{'a': 1}` -> `{1: 'a'}`.
medium.solution:
def invert_dict(d):
    return {v: k for k, v in d.items()}
hints: Use dict comprehension {v: k for k, v in d.items()}

hard.title: Deep Nested Dict Getter
hard.description: Write `get_nested(d, path_str, default=None)` where path_str is `'user.profile.name'`.
hints: Split path string by '.' and traverse

debugging.title: Fix Unhashable Key Error
debugging.description: Fix TypeError trying to use list as dict key.
bugs: Lists are unhashable. Convert key list to immutable tuple `(1, 2)`.
